title: Discord Integration
description: Notifies you on a discord webhook if you died.
body:
Notifies you on a discord webhook if you died.

# How to use?

1. Open the mod menu
2. Open the settings for the mod
3. Put your webhook in the Webhook URL field
4. Configure it the way you want


# How to create a webhook?

1. Create a discord server
2. Right click on a channel and click on 'Edit Channel'
3. Go to 'Integrations'
4. Click on 'Create Webhook'
